# awssigv4 Provider

Configures AWS credentials for the `awssigv4_request` ephemeral resource. All fields are optional — when omitted, the standard AWS SDK default credential provider chain applies (env vars, shared config/credentials files including `credential_process`, SSO, container/IMDS, etc.). There is no provider-level region attribute: the SigV4 signing region is resolved in this order — the ephemeral resource's `region` argument, then `AWS_REGION`/`AWS_DEFAULT_REGION`, then the active profile's `region` setting.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.10.0"
  required_providers {
    awssigv4 = {
      source = "asana/awssigv4"
    }
  }
}

# Minimal — uses the AWS SDK default credential chain (env vars, ~/.aws/config
# and ~/.aws/credentials including `credential_process`, SSO, IMDS, etc.).
# Signing region is resolved per ephemeral resource: the resource's `region`
# argument wins, otherwise the SDK falls back to AWS_REGION/AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
# and then the active profile's `region` setting.
provider "awssigv4" {}

# Or with explicit profile + assume_role:
#
# provider "awssigv4" {
#   profile                  = "engineering"
#   shared_config_files      = ["~/.aws/config"]
#   shared_credentials_files = ["~/.aws/credentials"]
#
#   assume_role {
#     role_arn         = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/terraform"
#     session_name     = "terraform-awssigv4"
#     duration_seconds = 3600
#   }
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_key` (String) Static AWS access key ID. Prefer profiles or the default credential chain.
- `assume_role` (Block, Optional) Assume an IAM role before signing requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--assume_role))
- `assume_role_with_web_identity` (Block, Optional) Assume an IAM role using a web identity (OIDC) token. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--assume_role_with_web_identity))
- `custom_ca_bundle` (String) Path to a PEM-encoded CA bundle for AWS API calls (STS, IMDS, SSO).
- `ec2_metadata_service_endpoint` (String) Override the IMDS endpoint.
- `ec2_metadata_service_endpoint_mode` (String) IMDS endpoint mode: `IPv4` or `IPv6`.
- `http_proxy` (String) HTTP proxy URL used for AWS API calls.
- `https_proxy` (String) HTTPS proxy URL used for AWS API calls.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS verification on AWS API endpoints (does not affect the SigV4 target URL).
- `max_retries` (Number) Maximum number of times the AWS SDK retries failed API calls during credential resolution.
- `no_proxy` (String) Comma-separated list of hosts that bypass the proxy.
- `profile` (String) Named profile from the shared config/credentials files.
- `retry_mode` (String) Retry mode for the AWS SDK: `standard` or `adaptive`.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Static AWS secret access key. Prefer profiles or the default credential chain.
- `shared_config_files` (List of String) Paths to shared AWS config files. Defaults to `~/.aws/config`.
- `shared_credentials_files` (List of String) Paths to shared AWS credentials files. Defaults to `~/.aws/credentials`.
- `skip_credentials_validation` (Boolean) Skip the STS `GetCallerIdentity` call used to validate credentials at provider startup.
- `skip_metadata_api_check` (Boolean) Disable the EC2 IMDS as a credential source.
- `sts_endpoint` (String) Override the STS endpoint URL (used when assuming roles).
- `sts_region` (String) Region for STS calls; defaults to `region` when unset.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Static AWS session token to pair with `access_key`/`secret_key`.
- `use_dualstack_endpoint` (Boolean) Use dual-stack (IPv4/IPv6) AWS endpoints when resolving credentials.
- `use_fips_endpoint` (Boolean) Use FIPS-compliant AWS endpoints when resolving credentials.

<a id="nestedblock--assume_role"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assume_role`

Optional:

- `duration_seconds` (Number) Session duration in seconds.
- `external_id` (String) External ID used when assuming the role.
- `policy` (String) Inline session policy.
- `policy_arns` (List of String) ARNs of managed policies to attach to the session.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the role to assume.
- `session_name` (String) Session name for the assumed role.
- `source_identity` (String) Source identity to set on the session.
- `tags` (Map of String) Session tags.
- `transitive_tag_keys` (List of String) Session tag keys passed to subsequent role chaining.


<a id="nestedblock--assume_role_with_web_identity"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assume_role_with_web_identity`

Optional:

- `duration_seconds` (Number) Session duration in seconds.
- `policy` (String) Inline session policy.
- `policy_arns` (List of String) ARNs of managed policies to attach to the session.
- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the role to assume.
- `session_name` (String) Session name for the assumed role.
- `web_identity_token` (String, Sensitive) Web identity (OIDC) token value.
- `web_identity_token_file` (String) Path to a file containing the web identity (OIDC) token.
